title: The Wacky Will Wood Pack
description: A Minecraft resource pack that adds a LOT of Will Wood. Like... a lot. Sorry not sorry.
body:
## Ever wanted to have a Will Wood themed Minecraft world/server? Well, now you can!
_~~If he, for some godforsaken reason sees this, please don't beat me up Will. I'm just a little guy.~~_
 
![uh oh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a737195f159448690c79e3b12be6d7f66b4be3b7.png)


Welcome to the _Wacky Will Wood Pack_, where various items throughout the game have been altered to Mr. Wood himself. These changes include, but are not limited to:

- Will Wood Paintings, including album covers in both big and small sizes
- Axolotl Tapeworm re-skin
- Will Wood/WWATT music discs with working music! Yayyy!
- Spyglass scope now has a slight Will Wood overlay. Don't ask.
- Goat horns changed to various Will Wood screams and/or random noises
- Book & Quill now have a Tapeworm decoration for funsies!

...and a lot more stuff that I'll let you find on your own! (Hint: make sure those doors are locked!)


INSTRUCTIONS ON MANUAL INSTALLATION:

1.) Download the pack for the version of the game you intend on playing
2.) Open Minecraft with said version
3.) Open Options -> Resource Packs
4.) Select 'Open Pack Folder' -> Drop downloaded pack into resource packs folder (NOTE: DO NOT UNZIP THE FILE. DROP IT IN ZIPPED!)
5.) Enjoy!

_(This is also included in the 'READ ME.txt' file in the folder, so if you aren't reading this now, hopefully you read it in there. Or read them both. Extra knowledgable.)_

By the way-- thanks for downloading or simply checking out the pack! I made it by myself in the span of like.. a week because I got really bored. I have a few updates planned; mainly little stuff I didn't have the energy to finish before I posted it, or didn't know how to yet.

If you have any questions, suggestions for the pack, or issues with installation/getting it to work, feel free to shoot me a message on Discord (@enchantederidian). I don't check Curseforge or Modrinth often, so it'll more than likely get seen there. <3
